news.summary: In Greenwood Village, Colorado on May 7, 2025, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a leading homebuilder in the United States, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share. Shareholders are set to receive this dividend on June 11, 2025.
news.headline: Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS) declares $0.29/share quarterly dividend, payable on June 11, 2025.

news.summary: Atlanta-based Newell Brands Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share. This dividend will be payable on June 13, 2025, to common stockholders recorded on May 30, 2025. Newell Brands (NASDAQ: NWL) is a prominent consumer goods company with popular brands like Rubbermaid, Sharpie, Graco, Coleman, Rubbermaid Commercial Products, Yankee Candle, Paper Mate, and Foo.
news.headline: Newell Brands (NWL) declares $0.07 quarterly dividend per share, payable on June 13, 2025 to stockholders of record on May 30, 2025.

news.summary: Reviving production, robust cash flow, and monetizing hedges have led to a reduction in debt. These initiatives have proven highly successful, resulting in a significant decrease in our debt levels. The strategic move to reactivate production has yielded positive results, along with harnessing the strong cash flow generated by our operations. Furthermore, smartly monetizing hedges has also played a key role in driving down our debt. These combined efforts have effectively lowered our debt to a notable extent, providing a more stable financial outlook for the company.
news.headline: Pieridae's Q1 2025 results show lower debt due to reactivated production, strong cash flow, and hedge monetization.

news.summary: An optimistic forecast has been made by crypto entrepreneur Arthur Hayes, predicting a potential surge in Bitcoin to record levels this year. Hayes foresees all necessary conditions being met for this anticipated rally in the cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: Bitcoin poised for a rally as per Arthur Hayes due to Fed influence, with potential for record highs.

news.summary: Dine Brands Global Inc. (NYSE: DIN) saw a rise in shares following the release of their first-quarter earnings report. The company experienced a 4.1% year-on-year revenue growth in the first quarter of FY25, reaching $214.78 million, slightly below the expected $217.56 million as per analyst estimates. This growth was largely propelled by an increase in company restaurant sales, primarily from acquiring 47 Applebee's restaurants in Q4 of 2024. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at $1.03, falling short of the projected $1.23. The detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dine Brands Global Inc. stock gained after reporting Q1 FY25 revenue growth of 4.1% to $214.78 million, missing estimate. EPS of $1.03 missed at $1.23.

news.summary: Sydney's Vivid Sydney 2025, the biggest arts and culture festival in the Southern Hemisphere, will feature the debut joint performance of popular TV personalities Nick Offerman and Megan Mullally on stage. The renowned husband-and-wife comedy duo will showcase their talents in an unscripted show.
news.headline: Television icons Nick Offerman and Megan Mullally to perform together at Vivid Sydney 2025, Southern Hemisphere's largest festival.

news.summary: In San Jose, California on May 7, 2025, Harmonic disclosed that Nimrod Ben-Natan, President and CEO, and Walter Jankovic, CFO, will conduct virtual investor sessions at the 20th Annual Needham Virtual Technology, Media & Consumer event. Harmonic is listed on NASDAQ as HLIT.
news.headline: Harmonic's CEO and CFO will participate in virtual investor meetings at two conferences.

news.summary: Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: CMTG) shared its financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025, in New York. The Company disclosed a GAAP net loss of $78.6 million, equivalent to $0.56 per share, for the same period. In terms of Distributable Loss, a non-GAAP financial metric, the reported figure was $35.7 million, or $0.25 per share. Additionally, Distributable Earnings before realized losses were $11.6 million, translating to $0.08 per share for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: CMTG) reported Q1 2025 financial results: GAAP net loss $78.6M, Distributable Loss $35.7M.

news.summary: The latest figures show that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country, with over 10,000 new cases reported in the past 24 hours. This brings the total number of cases to nearly 200,000. Additionally, there have been 150 new deaths, bringing the total number of fatalities to over 5,000. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: Sila Realty Trust reveals Q1 2025 results, marking a profitable start to the year.

news.summary: Dream Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN) shared its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The Comparative Properties Net Operating Income (NOI) for Q1 2025 stood at $6.1 million, marking a 0.8% growth compared to the previous quarter. The company is set to hold a conference call on May 8, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (ET) to further discuss these results.
news.headline: Dream Residential REIT's Q1 2025 results show comparative properties NOI of $6.1 million, up 0.8% from previous quarter.

news.summary: American Integrity Insurance Group, Inc. declared the pricing of its initial public offering, unveiling 6,875,000 shares of common stock at a cost of $16.00 per share. Trading of these shares is set to commence on May 8, 2025, on the New York Stock Exchange with the symbol “AII.” The offering is projected to conclude by May 9, 2025, barring any unforeseen circumstances, comprising 6,250,000 shares.
news.headline: American Integrity priced its IPO at $16.00 per share, offering 6,875,000 shares to trade on NYSE under "AII" on May 8.

news.summary: LOS ANGELES & JOHANNESBURG—A notable announcement was made by the Milken Institute and the Motsepe Foundation, revealing the recipient of the prestigious Milken-Motsepe Prize in FinTech. This esteemed $2 million award aims to recognize companies dedicated to enhancing access to capital and financial services for small businesses in emerging and frontier markets. The unveiling of the winner took place at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Los Angeles. Verto, headquartered in the United Kingdom, secured the top spot, clinching the $1 million Grand Prize for its innovative initiatives.
news.headline: Milken Institute and Motsepe Foundation reward Verto with $1 million Grand Prize in FinTech for expanding financial services access.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Swiss Water Decaffeinated Coffee Inc. (TSX:SWP) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. Swiss Water, a prominent player in specialty coffee and premium green coffee decaffeination, presented the report. All figures are denoted in Canadian dollars, unless specified otherwise.
news.headline: Swiss Water reports Q1 2025 results; leading coffee company, TSX:SWP - Vancouver, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, SourceNow has introduced Sage AI, an innovative intelligent agent integrated within a Vendor Management System (VMS). This AI-powered solution represents a significant advancement in managing contingent labor for organizations, providing clients with instant insights, automation, and remarkable productivity. Unlike conventional VMS systems, Sage AI functions as a collaborative partner that continuously learns and adapts to optimize efficiency. This launch signifies a groundbreaking shift in workforce management, promising enhanced operational capabilities.
news.headline: SourceNow introduces Sage AI, the first AI agent in a VMS platform, enhancing workforce management with real-time intelligence and automation.
Sumitomo Chem to construct transparent LCD plant in South Korea Nikkan Kogyo

news.summary: Shares of Axon Enterprise Inc (NASDAQ: AXON) are experiencing an after-hours surge following the company's surpassing of first-quarter expectations and an upward revision of its full-year guidance. In Q1, Axon posted revenue of $603.63 million, exceeding analyst projections of $583.76 million. Additionally, the company reported adjusted earnings of $1.41 per share for the quarter, surpassing analyst estimates of $1.27 per share. The positive performance has propelled the stock higher post-market hours.
news.headline: Axon Enterprise (NASDAQ: AXON) beats Q1 estimates with revenue at $603.63 million. Stock jumps after-hours.

news.summary: In its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025, LandBridge Company LLC (NYSE: LB) reported significant financial growth. The company disclosed revenues of $44.0 million, marking a considerable increase of 131% compared to the previous year and a 20% rise from the previous quarter. Net income for the quarter reached $15.5 million, resulting in a net income margin of 35%. LandBridge also revealed an adjusted EBITDA of $38.8 million, a year-over-year surge of 129% and a quarter-over-quarter increase of 22%, with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 88%. The company indicated strong cash flows for the quarter, showcasing positive financial performance.
news.headline: LandBridge Company LLC reported Q1 2025 results with revenues of $44.0 million, a 131% YoY increase and net income of $15.5 million.

news.summary: Shares of MercadoLibre saw a significant increase in value following a strong performance in Q1, surpassing sales projections and exceeding earnings estimates. Often described as the "Amazon of Latin America," the e-commerce company's stock soared after this promising financial report. This further fueled the ongoing upward trend in MercadoLibre's stock prices, reflecting investor enthusiasm for the company's performance.
news.headline: MercadoLibre stock surged post Q1 beat & topped earnings forecasts, reinforcing its position as Latin America’s top e-commerce firm.

news.summary: During the first quarter, AppLovin exceeded Wall Street's expectations with strong advertising revenue growth. The company posted impressive figures, surpassing analysts' targets. Investor's Business Daily reported that AppLovin's performance in Q1 was outstanding, highlighting its success in driving ad revenue higher.
news.headline: AppLovin surpasses Q1 targets with strong ad revenue growth, beats Wall Street's expectations.
Moon-soo, emergency press conference at 8:30 AM… Focus on announcement of unification position

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, The Inn at Diamond Cove will welcome guests for the beginning of the 2025 season at its location on Great Diamond Island in Maine's Casco Bay. This historic island retreat in Portland, Maine reopens with new early-season packages for visitors to enjoy. This reopening follows the announcement made on May 7, 2025, and marks the start of another season for the inn.
news.headline: Inn at Diamond Cove reopens on May 22, 2025, in Maine's Casco Bay, featuring new early-season packages for the 2025 season.

news.summary: A prestigious resort in Park City, Utah, known as The Lodge at Blue Sky, Auberge Resorts Collection, is set to host a series of exclusive dining events featuring globally acclaimed chefs. The resort, situated amidst the breathtaking natural scenery of Utah, will offer guests a unique culinary experience. Scheduled for May 7, 2025, this event is highly anticipated and promises to be extraordinary. Stay tuned for further updates on this one-of-a-kind dining opportunity in the picturesque landscape of Utah.
news.headline: The Lodge at Blue Sky in Park City, Utah, will host renowned chefs for unique dining experiences this summer.

news.summary: A skilled financial professional with proven expertise in strategy and operations has joined The Facilities Group (TFG), the fastest-growing facilities maintenance company in the country. This addition took place in Tampa, Florida on May 7, 2025. TFG is recognized as a leading privately owned firm offering facilities maintenance services.
news.headline: Sheryar Ghani is appointed as Enterprise CFO at The Facilities Group, a leading maintenance company; effective from May 7, 2025.

news.summary: A new high-speed backup deduplication system for IBM i has been introduced by BEdupe in Tulsa, Oklahoma. The system, named BEdupe, is designed to optimize storage savings and enable efficient cloud replication. Revealed on May 7, 2025, by BEdupe LLC, the next-generation deduplication system is specifically developed to cater to the needs of IBM i users. This system boasts advanced features aimed at enhancing storage efficiency and facilitating seamless cloud replication.
news.headline: BEdupe introduces new high-speed deduplication system for IBM i, optimized for storage savings and cloud replication.

news.summary: Construction Concepts, a new consultancy specializing in the construction industry, has been launched with the aim of offering management solutions to commercial contractors. Founded by Michael Culnen, a experienced executive in surety and construction insurance, the company is dedicated to optimizing operations and reducing risk. With a focus on providing comprehensive services, Construction Concepts aims to support contractors in navigating the challenges of the industry. This venture comes at a time when the construction sector faces increasing complexities, with estimates showing that the consultancy industry is expected to grow by $12.2 billion by 2025. Michael Culnen's expertise and the services offered by Construction Concepts are anticipated to meet the evolving needs of contractors in the market.
news.headline: Construction Concepts, a consultancy, launched to optimize operations for commercial contractors. Founded by Michael Culnen.

news.summary: Lewis Barbecue has recently introduced their new Secret Sauce, promising to elevate dining experiences across the nation with its irresistible flavor. The announcement was made in Charleston, South Carolina on May 7, 2025. As all eyes turn to Rome for the unveiling of a new pope, Lewis Barbecue's revelation is creating a buzz in the culinary world. This new sauce is set to revolutionize meals with its unique taste, setting a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: Lewis Barbecue launches new Secret Sauce to elevate dining nationwide, during Rome's pope selection.

news.summary: More than 4,600 physicians, health professionals, and health leaders attended ACLM's annual conference in 2024 in St. Louis. The event featured presentations on the latest research and innovative implementation models in the field of lifestyle medicine by leading experts.
news.headline: American College of Lifestyle Medicine annual conference wins Gold Circle Award from American Society of Association Executives. 2024 event attracted 4,600 attendees to learn about lifestyle medicine.

news.summary: CEO and Co-Founder of Dogtown Media, Marc Fischer, recently returned to Capitol Hill in Washington on May 7, 2025, to advocate for the regulation of AI as well as promote telemedicine and smart health policies. Fischer participated alongside other prominent figures in the technology sector during the Global App Economy event.
news.headline: Dogtown Media CEO Marc Fischer to speak at Global App Economy Conference 2025 on AI regulation, telemedicine, and smart health policies. #TechPolicy.

news.summary: Brinqa, a prominent authority in unified exposure management, has revealed its latest 2025 State of Exposure Management report. This extensive study delves into the challenges faced by security teams in coping with the increasing complexity and abundance of vulnerabilities in modern times.
news.headline: 2025 State of Exposure Management Report by Brinqa shows security teams struggle with cyber risk prioritization vs. action.

news.summary: In a significant development, the Ministry of Education and Science of Ukraine has forged a valuable partnership with Panopto, a leading provider of AI-driven video learning solutions, aimed at equipping Ukrainian institutions with state-of-the-art tools. This collaboration, announced on May 7, 2025, not only includes the implementation of cutting-edge AI video technologies but also outlines a joint research agenda focused on the evolution of learning methodologies. The partnership is poised to bring significant advancements to the education sector in Ukraine, marking a pivotal moment in enhancing learning experiences.
news.headline: Ukraine's Ministry of Education partners with Panopto for AI adoption, empowering institutions with video tools.

news.summary: A new milestone has been reached by transcosmos as the company recently inaugurated Guro Center 2 and 3, adding 900 workstations to its operations. Along with the existing Guro Center 1, this expansion has established a robust contact center network in the Guro area, totaling 1,200 workstations. This significant development underscores transcosmos' commitment to enhancing its operational capacity and service offerings.
news.headline: transcosmos expands in South Korea, opening Guro Center 2 and 3 with 900 workstations, bringing total to 1,200 in Guro area.

news.summary: Tickets for the community-driven, site-specific performance "DC, I Love You" are now on sale at the Folger Shakespeare Library. The event will take place in the Mount Pleasant neighborhood of Washington, DC, and throughout public spaces at the library.
news.headline: Tickets now available for "DC, I Love You" showing real love stories in DC's Mount Pleasant and Capitol Hill neighborhoods.

news.summary: CREO recently introduced a selection of five AI services designed to enhance efficiency for corporations in the life sciences and healthcare sectors. These new services encompass a variety of options, including strategic planning, interactive workshops, solution creation, and fractional leadership support. They are tailored to support companies in their growth stages, providing valuable insights and tools to optimize operations.
news.headline: CREO expands AI services with 5 offerings for life sciences and healthcare, aiding growth stage companies.

news.summary: Ascert has revealed that its VersaTest DGN D-PAS DCI EMV L3 (host) Test Pack (version 2.9.0) has received official qualification from Discover Financial Services as an accepted Level 3 (L3) test tool. The announcement was made in London on May 7, 2025. Ascert, a prominent player in advanced testing, continues to strengthen its position in the industry.
news.headline: Ascert's VersaTest DGN D-PAS L3 Host Test Pack (version 2.9.0) qualified by Discover Financial Services.

news.summary: Chroma Technology reaffirms its dedication to aiding the scientific community amidst changes in government policy affecting scientific funding. The company, based in Bellows Falls, Vermont, continues to uphold its support. The recent developments in government policy have brought about significant alterations in the scientific funding landscape. The commitment of Chroma Technology remains unwavering despite these shifts.
news.headline: Chroma Technology reaffirms commitment to supporting scientific communities despite policy changes.

news.summary: JINLAW, a national nonprofit organization, has appointed a new member to its team. The organization is dedicated to fighting antisemitism through education and aims to create a network of Jewish professionals and supporters in the insurance and legal fields.
news.headline: JINLAW, a nonprofit combatting antisemitism, announces new board members to build a community of insurance and legal professionals.

news.summary: Today, in Chandler, Arizona, WLTH Capital Management, an independent wealth management firm, was officially launched by industry veteran Cean Kenefick-Rogers. With proven leadership experience, Kenefick-Rogers brings a wealth of knowledge to the new venture. This new firm marks the beginning of a promising journey in the financial sector on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: WLTH Capital Management launched in Chandler, Arizona, offering tailored wealth solutions to high-net-worth clientele. CEO Cean Kenefick-Rogers aims to lead this new venture.

news.summary: Greenberg Traurig, LLP has been honored with the title of "Life Sciences Patent Strategy Firm of the Year" by the Life Sciences Patent Network (LSPN). This recognition was awarded to the firm's Life Sciences & Medical Technology Group for their outstanding performance and expertise in life sciences intellectual property. This prestigious award showcases Greenberg Traurig's position as a leader in the field and highlights their dedication to providing top-tier services in this sector.
news.headline: Greenberg Traurig named Life Sciences Patent Strategy Firm of the Year by LSPN, for excellence in IP.

news.summary: In an effort to support Hollywood and safeguard American film employment, President Donald Trump has suggested implementing a 100% tariff on all movies made by foreign producers. The proposal, which is still pending a final verdict, has raised concerns within the international film sector. The announcement was made on May 7, 2025, in Washington, D.C.
news.headline: Trump proposes 100% tariff on foreign films to boost Hollywood, causing global film industry concern.

news.summary: SchoolStatus, a prominent EdTech company, has expanded its reach to aid more than 3.6 million students in 514 school districts in California. The organization is playing a crucial role in enhancing attendance rates statewide through the use of data-driven tools and innovative family engagement solutions. This development is significant in boosting educational outcomes and fostering a stronger connection between schools and families. The company is headquartered in Sacramento, California and made this announcement on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: SchoolStatus partners with 514 California districts to improve attendance, reaching 3.6 million students. #EdTech #DataDriven.

news.summary: In Caxias do Sul, Brazil, on May 7, 2025, Frasle Mobility announced a landmark achievement in the first quarter of the year 2025 by achieving a record consolidated net revenue of R$1.3 billion. This information was disclosed on Wednesday, reflecting a remarkable growth of 58.3% compared to previous periods.
news.headline: Frasle Mobility achieves record net revenue of R$1.3 billion in Q1 2025, up by 58.3% compared to the previous year.
Brazil to auction up to 25,000 foreign exchange swaps on May 8

news.summary: Stripe has rolled out stablecoin-based accounts in over 100 countries, allowing clients to hold US-dollar stablecoin account balances like a traditional bank account. The feature supports Circle's USDC and Bridge's USDB stablecoins, with Stripe acquiring Bridge in October 2024. This move comes amid growing adoption of stablecoins in developing economies battling inflation and financial infrastructure limitations. The stablecoin market cap exceeds $231 billion, with international demand boosting the use of US dollar tokens. Stablecoins, combined with blockchain payment systems, are vital in banking the unbanked in regions with limited financial services. Stripe's earlier integration of stablecoin payments in October 2024 saw strong demand in 70 countries. Latin Americans are increasingly using stablecoins for online transactions, pointing to their rise as a store of value and medium of exchange.
news.headline: Stripe expands stablecoin accounts to 100+ countries, offering clients US-dollar balances through USDC and USDB stablecoins. Benefits include easier cross-border transfers and store of value in developing economies. Stablecoin market cap exceeds $231B.

news.summary: Shares of MercadoLibre Inc (NASDAQ: MELI) are experiencing a surge in after-hours trading following the release of their first-quarter results, which surpassed expectations. In Q1, the company reported revenue of $5.93 billion, exceeding estimated $5.51 billion, and an EPS of $9.74, higher than the anticipated $8.03. Total revenue saw a 37% increase year-over-year driven by strategic investments. Commerce revenue rose by 32%, Financial revenue by 37%, and Fintech revenue growth . . . The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: MercadoLibre Stock Soars with Q1 Earnings Beat: Revenue $5.93B, EPS $9.74; Total revenue up 37% YoY.
Keg Royalties Income Fund reports Q1 2025 earnings.

news.summary: Visa, the well-known payments company, has recently made a strategic investment in BVNK, a startup focusing on stablecoin infrastructure. This marks Visa's second venture into the crypto world in a short span of time.
news.headline: Visa invests in stablecoin startup BVNK, marking its second crypto move. Payment titan shows confidence in growing demand.
Benjamin Heselton appointed as Lamb Weston's CIO. Will lead global tech strategy. Former CTO at Wurth IT USA.

news.summary: Sierra Metals Inc. has released its consolidated financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company's stock is listed as TSX: SMT and OTCQX: SMTSF, with BVL: SMT also available. The report includes details from the Q1 2025 financial statements and Management’s Discussion and Analysis, which can be found on Sierra Metals’ official website and on SEDAR+ under the Company’s profile. For more information and specific numbers, it is recommended to refer to the aforementioned sources.
news.headline: Sierra Metals reports Q1 2025 financial results. Details available on their website and SEDAR. TSX: SMT | OTCQX: SMTSF | BVL: SMT.

news.summary: Crown Capital Partners Inc. released its financial results for Q1 2025, reporting a net loss of $(1.8) million compared to $(0.6) million in Q1 2024. Adjusted EBITDA was $1.7 million in Q1 2025, an increase from $1.3 million in Q1 2024. Distribution services revenue saw a significant increase to $10.8 million in Q1 2025 from $8.2 million in Q1 2024. Network services revenue also increased to $8.7 million in Q1 2025 from $6.7 million in Q1 2024. Real Estate segment revenue decreased to $1.0 million from $1.6 million in Q1 2024, while Distributed Power revenue decreased to $0.3 million from $0.8 million in Q1 2024. Total equity decreased to $6.9 million from $8.6 million at the end of 2024. Total revenue for Q1 2025 was $21.1 million. More details available on SEDAR at www.sedarplus.ca or Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Crown Capital Partners reports Q1 2025 financial results: net loss of $(1.8)M, Adjusted EBITDA of $1.7M, revenue $21.1M.

news.summary: Robust performance in all three operations resulted in All-In Sustaining Costs coming in below projections and gold production surpassing initial expectations for the first quarter.
news.headline: B2Gold: Q1 2025 results show strong performance - lower costs, higher gold production.
